problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
